plugins.name: ctx
plugins.description: Context hygiene for AI-assisted codebases. Finds stale, contradictory, and drifting AI context files across 10+ tool ecosystems.

plugins.name: strip-ansi
plugins.description: Prevents ANSI escape sequences from polluting agent context, commits, PRs, and file edits via a PostToolUse hook on Bash.

plugins.name: codeweaver
plugins.description: Semantic code search with hybrid search, AST-level understanding, and intelligent chunking for 166+ languages.
